user.title: Connect to the Filament Stock add-on
user.description: Leave the default URL to auto-discover the add-on on the HA docker network (the integration will try several known hostnames). Override only if you run the add-on elsewhere (e.g. on a separate host).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the add-on at that URL. Make sure the Filament Stock add-on is installed and started.

init.title: Filament Stock options
init.description: Adjust how often Home Assistant polls the add-on for fresh stock data.
